testsuite.name: JwtFilter (catalog) - Tests del filtro JWT

testcase.name: token completamente inválido: pasa sin autenticar y no lanza excepción
token con firma incorrecta: pasa sin autenticar
sin header Authorization: pasa el filtro sin autenticar

testsuite.system-out: 2026-05-29T16:13:37.438-05:00 WARN 10008 --- [ Test worker] c.s.c.i.entry_points.JwtFilter : JWT inválido en catálogo: Malformed protected header JSON: Unable to deserialize: Unrecognized token 'z': was expecting (JSON String, Number, Array, Object or token 'null', 'true' or 'false') at [Source: REDACTED (`StreamReadFeature.INCLUDE_SOURCE_IN_LOCATION` disabled); line: 1, column: 2] 2026-05-29T16:13:37.469-05:00 WARN 10008 --- [ Test worker] c.s.c.i.entry_points.JwtFilter : JWT inválido en catálogo: JWT signature does not match locally computed signature. JWT validity cannot be asserted and should not be trusted.
